content:
Si, les tests sont tous corrects !
Je ne comprends rien aux critiques ci-dessous.

Goal
* While optional, it's recommended to format "Stability Index" as a [[variable]] or in <<bold>> instead of as a {{constant}}, since it isn't a constant.

* Please format "bit-flip glitch" in <<bold>>. The current monospace format places the term on its own line and reduces readability.

* Please format n, p, q and r as [[variables]] in the formula.

Cases
* Each test and its validator should cover the same scenario with slightly different inputs and outputs. Hence, please revise the cases listed below:

  • Test 2 (all odd integers) and Validator 2 (all even integers) don't align.

  • Test 3 (2-digit integers) and Validator 3 (integers close to the upper bound of 1000) don't align.

  • Test 4 (1-digit integers) and Validator 4 (mix of 1-digit and 3-digit integers) don't align.

* Additionally, there are already many cases using 1-digit integers. Please incorporate a broader range of random integers to better reflect the full range specified in the constraint.

Thanks.

You may want to take a look at the official documentation:

https://www.codingame.com/playgrounds/40701/help-center/statement

https://www.codingame.com/playgrounds/40701/help-center/test-cases

Hope this clarifies.
